title: Implement governed work object contracts
summary: Add canonical contracts, fixtures, and validation for Project, Milestone, Task, and Bug.

lineage.rationale: The milestone plan requires a bounded contract-only implementation for R3-002.

relationships.notes: The task includes the canonical bug contract needed by the same proof slice.

evidence.summary: The milestone brief authorizes the bounded contract scope.
The task contract itself is a durable output.
The contract test proves the task output coheres with the repo pattern.

audit.notes: Task output reviewed against the focused contract test.

scope_summary: Stay inside contract definition and validation only.
requested_outcome: Create governed work object contracts and invariant rules with concise replayable validation.
acceptance_checks: Each governed work object has a canonical contract.
Invalid fixtures are rejected with explicit invariant errors.
completion_summary: Canonical contract files, valid fixtures, invalid fixtures, and a focused validation test were added.
